## Frequently asked questions

### What is Seduced?

Seduced is the leading AI porn generator, allowing anyone to generate AI porn images and videos without effort or technical knowledge. Unlike many chatbots, we are an actual porn generator that supports the generation of various fetishes and sexual poses. You have the power to produce realistic as well as anime images and videos. With a diverse selection of AI models and extensions at your fingertips, you can tailor your creations to suit your preferences.

### What is AI porn?

AI porn consists of pornographic images and videos fully generated by artificial intelligence.

### How to make AI porn?

By entering a prompt or text description, you can generate a corresponding image or video. It is very simple and does not require any technical knowledge.

### Can you also generate gay content?

Yes, we have recently introduced support for solo male content, however, our platform is focused on female and hetero content, as well as futanari or trans.

### Are the images private?

You have the option to make the images or videos private at your discretion.

### Can I upscale the images?

Yes, you can enhance the resolution of generated images by two or three times through upscaling. This process not only increases resolution but also adds finer details, resulting in more realistic images.

### Is it possible to use my own images as reference?

Certainly, you can use your own images, provided that you own the rights to them and purchase the plan through Epoch or Cryptocurrency.

### Can I re-use characters?

Yes, with Seduced re-using characters and creating AI influencers or girls is effortless. This method is particularly effective for realistic images.

### Can I generate porn videos?

Yes. You can generate videos up to 10 seconds long. We currently offer 2 models (V2 and V3) for text-to-video generation, and 3 models for image-to-video (Animate). With Animate V2 and its extensions, you can transform static sexual image generations into fluid, realistic animations—almost like magic.

### Can I generate NSFW (not-safe-for-work) images?

Yes, Seduced allows for the generation of NSFW images and videos, within the legal boundaries.

### Is this suitable for pornstars and models?

Yes, as a pornstar, you can create and train your own AI model for image generation on our platform.

### You don't need tech skills or a powerful computer

Tech skills and a powerful hardware are required to generate high-quality AI content, especially NSFW. Not with Seduced AI.
With Seduced AI, you just need to type the prompt and select the AI model
